name: analysis-engineering-workflow
description: Framework-guided workflow skills for planning, architecture, implementation, execution, adversarial review, and debugging in Python and Julia ML/data/AI projects.

interface.shortDescription: Standards-guided planning, architecture, implementation, verification, review, and debugging.
interface.longDescription: Analysis Engineering Workflow provides Codex skills for governed ML, data science, AI engineering, system design, and software engineering workflows. Reviews are anchored to ISO/IEC/IEEE 12207, ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288, ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010, ISO/IEC 25010, SEI ATAM, NIST SSDF, OWASP ASVS/SAMM, NIST AI RMF, and NASA/JPL critical-code discipline.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the governed workflow skills to plan, architect, review, implement, verify, and debug this task.
